steps.title: Set up the illustration
steps.content: The first independent clause says Butterfly attempts to use the entire visual light spectrum. The following description of the rainbow-striped swimmer illustrates that claim.

steps.title: Use the colon
steps.content: A and D use while even though the following words begin with a participial phrase, not a full subordinate clause. C gives no punctuation between the claim and its illustration. A colon correctly introduces the explanatory image. The answer is B.
